creator: andy.lavr@reactor-xg.kiev.ua
text:
Hi!


If install new test ALSA ports http://chromium.jaggeri.com/ then error:

/usr/ports/x11/kdebase4-runtime/work/kdebase-runtime-4.3.5/phonon/platform_kde/devicelisting.cpp: 
In function 'void installAlsaPhononDeviceHandle()':
 
/usr/ports/x11/kdebase4-runtime/work/kdebase-runtime-4.3.5/phonon/platform_kde/devicelisting.cpp:44: 
error: 'snd_config_update_free_global' was not declared in this scope
 
/usr/ports/x11/kdebase4-runtime/work/kdebase-runtime-4.3.5/phonon/platform_kde/devicelisting.cpp:45: 
error: 'snd_config_update' was not declared in this scope
 
/usr/ports/x11/kdebase4-runtime/work/kdebase-runtime-4.3.5/phonon/platform_kde/devicelisting.cpp:53: 
error: 'snd_input_t' was not declared in this scope
 
/usr/ports/x11/kdebase4-runtime/work/kdebase-runtime-4.3.5/phonon/platform_kde/devicelisting.cpp:53: 
error: 'sndInput' was not declared in this scope
 
/usr/ports/x11/kdebase4-runtime/work/kdebase-runtime-4.3.5/phonon/platform_kde/devicelisting.cpp:54: 
error: 'snd_input_buffer_open' was not declared in this scope
 
/usr/ports/x11/kdebase4-runtime/work/kdebase-runtime-4.3.5/phonon/platform_kde/devicelisting.cpp:56: 
error: 'snd_config' was not declared in this scope
 
/usr/ports/x11/kdebase4-runtime/work/kdebase-runtime-4.3.5/phonon/platform_kde/devicelisting.cpp:56: 
error: 'snd_config_load' was not declared in this scope
 
/usr/ports/x11/kdebase4-runtime/work/kdebase-runtime-4.3.5/phonon/platform_kde/devicelisting.cpp:57: 
error: 'snd_input_close' was not declared in this scope



I deleted all ports Alsa. kdebase4-runtime compile fine.


Sorry. Thanks.



-- 
  Best regards, Andrei V. Lavreniyuk.
